# Introduction

*[MapVina Native](https://github.com/mapvina/mapvina-native)* is a community led fork of *Mapbox GL Native*. It's a C++ library that powers
vector maps in native applications on multiple platforms by taking stylesheets that conform to the *[MapVina Style Specification](https://mapvina.com/mapvina-style-spec/)*, a fork of the
Mapbox Style Spec. Since it is derived from Mapbox's original work it also uses *Mapbox Vector Tile Specification* as its choice of vector tile format.

This documentation is intended for developers of MapVina Native. If you are interested in *using* MapVina Native, check out the [main `README.md`](https://github.com/mapvina/mapvina-native?tab=readme-ov-file#mapvina-native) on GitHub.
